hops.context: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) regressors used to achieve higher accuracy.
Despite the large parameter count of CodeLlama-7B, our LoRA-based parameter-efficient fine-tuning keeps GPU memory usage at roughly 41GB.
LoRA-based parameter-efficient fine-tuning used for CodeLlama-7B.

question: How does the Mixture-of-Experts approach contribute to the performance and efficiency of the CodeLlama-7B model?

options.A: It increases the GPU memory usage of CodeLlama-7B by implementing a complex algorithmic structure.
options.B: It improves the accuracy of CodeLlama-7B by utilizing LoRA, which is a parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique.
options.C: It reduces the training time of CodeLlama-7B by employing a reduced number of parameters in its architecture.
options.D: It decreases the overall computational power required by CodeLlama-7B through a simplification of the model's layers.

explanation: The Mixture-of-Experts improves the accuracy of the CodeLlama-7B model by utilizing LoRA, which is specifically mentioned as a technique for parameter-efficient fine-tuning. This approach helps in managing the large parameter count without excessively increasing GPU memory usage.
context: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) regressors used to achieve higher accuracy. | Despite the large parameter count of CodeLlama-7B, our LoRA-based parameter-efficient fine-tuning keeps GPU memory usage at roughly 41GB. | LoRA-based parameter-efficient fine-tuning used for CodeLlama-7B.
